  1. org.jscience.natural.medicine

Uses of Package
org.jscience.natural.medicine

Package
Description
org.jscience.natural.device.sim
Provides classes and interfaces for org.jscience.natural.device.sim.
org.jscience.natural.medicine
Provides the org.jscience.social.medicine module.
org.jscience.natural.medicine.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine.pharmacology
 
org.jscience.natural.ui.viewers.devices
Provides JavaFX-based visual representations of physical
org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation package in the JScience library.

    Class
    Description
    VitalSigns
    Immutable record representing a snapshot of vital signs.
    VitalSignsMonitor
    Interface for vital signs monitoring devices (e.g., bedside monitors).

    Description

    Extensible enumeration for anatomical directional terms.

    Extensible enumeration for ATC main groups.

    Represents a specific interaction between two drugs.

    Medication
    Represents a medication or drug with clinical and pharmaceutical details.

    MedicationForm
    Extensible enumeration for medication pharmaceutical forms.
    MedicationRoute
    Extensible enumeration for medication administration routes.
    OrganSystem
    Extensible enumeration for major biological organ systems.
    Pathology
    Common ancestor for all medicine-related troubles (diseases, allergies, etc.).

    Schmidt Sting Pain Index.
    VitalSigns
    Immutable record representing a snapshot of vital signs.
